## Safety checklist

- [ ] I did not paste a real `.env` file.
- [ ] I removed OAuth codes, access tokens, refresh tokens, client secrets, cookies, encryption keys, stream URLs, manifest URLs, and segment URLs.
- [ ] I am not requesting DRM bypass, protected-stream decryption, token scraping, credential extraction, or license-server interaction.
